sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-quantized integer converter for a flattened matrix using Q15 scale and zero-point, with unsigned quantized clamping.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational quantized integer GEMM core that subtracts zero-points and accumulates dot products into INT32 results.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization block that converts INT32 accumulators back to FP32 using the product of Q15 input scales.
